title: Spookay Lucky Block
description:
The Spookay Lucky Block mod can spawn mobs like Boomer, Creeper Witch and even more. Block structures, hordes of mobs, mini bosses and even more!

 

This mod has all sorts of mob armor mod (Certain armor even has full abilities of that mobs), mini bosses
body:
This lucky block mod doesn't require you to install lucky block mod and is a standalone mod and can be installed by simply placing it in mods folder.
If you are lucky this mod will reward you with epic items or simply flood your world with hordes of dangerous mobs or even blew everything up.

 

The Spookay Lucky Block mod can spawn mobs like Boomer, Creeper Witch and even more. Block structures, hordes of mobs, mini bosses and even more!

 

This mod has all sorts of mob armor mod (Certain armor even has full abilities of that mobs), mini bosses like Super Witch, Mother Spider, Boomer(Explodes on death) and much more!

 

Creepefied Enderman Armor(Press shift to teleport around like enderman).

Iron Golem Armor(Have same attack and power as iron golem).

Wither Armor(Nothing Much yet).

Spider Armor(Jump and climb walls like spider).

Cave Spider Armor(Jump and climb and poison like cave spider).

Creeper Armor(Nothing Yet.)

 

 

Pumpkin. Doesn't have any proper use  in vanilla minecraft. There literally are only for decoration.
Do you wish to have more uses to it? Well now you will be able to create this amazing block!

 

Just place pumpkin around a dropper in the crafting table and magic will happen!



 

There aren't any luck levels or any other integers that this lucky block will depends.
So that means it's purely depends on your luck, even first block may instantly kill you.
Or maybe after 20 blocks you will still get hundreads or even thousands of diamonds..

Caution!: Backup your world before using this mod as it may litterally ruin your whole world in 1 second... 

Mod Copyright for mod packs/distribution: [https://www.rolikdevelopment.com/mod-copyright/]


And just incase be careful place this block outside of your base at least a 1000 blocks..
